title: Legacy docs URL redirects and Coolify deploy guidance

source.subject: fix(site): legacy URL redirects and Coolify deploy guidance.

body:
Site preserves book/platform-spec deep links through legacy redirects and documents Coolify deploy steps aligned with the new multi-service layout.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`029f189`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/029f189)
- **Subject:** fix(site): legacy URL redirects and Coolify deploy guidance.
- **Completed:** 2026-05-26

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Workstream:** `platform-docs-dx`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-platform-dx`

## What shipped

Site preserves book/platform-spec deep links through legacy redirects and documents Coolify deploy steps aligned with the new multi-service layout.
